case_title: DEBORAH DEAN-RIVERS VS. AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DEAN-RIVERS, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH DEAN-RIVERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIMCO HOLDING QRS, INC.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BREYANNA MITCHELL, ASSISTANT COMMUNITY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEAN-RIVERS, DEBORAH AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-16-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEAN-RIVERS, DEBORAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEAN-RIVERS, DEBORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIMCO HOLDINGS QRS, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
